condition: shoulder injury (rotator cuff tear or ligament damage)
onset: about two weeks after lifting a heavy object
pain_location: front and side of the shoulder, sometimes extending down to the arm
pain_nature: sharp pain during hand movements, throbbing pain during rest, numbness and tingling sensation
duration: about two weeks without significant relief
previous_history: occasional strain due to exercise before this injury
functional_limitations: extremely difficult to lift my arm, raise the shoulder, or perform normal activities
medical_history: no major medical conditions, overall health is normal
red_flags: significant swelling (around 8-9 inches), spreading pain, numbness and tingling in the arm
treatments_taken: anti-inflammatory medications, resting, consultation with a doctor but no specific treatment recommended
